'''totadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vocalizational|vocalizational]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vocalizational|vocalizational]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| totadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:totadithi|totadithi]] || [[word:totadiji|totadiji]] || [[word:totadishi|totadishi]] || [[word:totadiki|totadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:totaduthuthu|totaduthuthu]] || [[word:totadujuju|totadujuju]] || [[word:totadushushu|totadushushu]] || [[word:totadukuku|totadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:totaduthu|totaduthu]] || [[word:totaduju|totaduju]] || [[word:totadushu|totadushu]] || [[word:totaduku|totaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:totadufthuf|totadufthuf]] || [[word:totadufjuf|totadufjuf]] || [[word:totadufshuf|totadufshuf]] || [[word:totadufkuf|totadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:totadethe|totadethe]] || [[word:totadeje|totadeje]] || [[word:totadeshe|totadeshe]] || [[word:totadeke|totadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:totadothotho|totadothotho]] || [[word:totadojojo|totadojojo]] || [[word:totadoshosho|totadoshosho]] || [[word:totadokoko|totadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:totadotho|totadotho]] || [[word:totadojo|totadojo]] || [[word:totadosho|totadosho]] || [[word:totadoko|totadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:totadofthof|totadofthof]] || [[word:totadofjof|totadofjof]] || [[word:totadofshof|totadofshof]] || [[word:totadofkof|totadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:totadĂŻfthĂŻf|totadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfjĂŻf|totadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfshĂŻf|totadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfkĂŻf|totadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:totadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|totadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|totadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|totadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|totadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:totadĂŻfthĂŻf|totadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfjĂŻf|totadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfshĂŻf|totadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfkĂŻf|totadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:totadĂŻfthĂŻf|totadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfjĂŻf|totadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfshĂŻf|totadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:totadĂŻfkĂŻf|totadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:totadĂŠthĂŠ|totadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:totadĂŠjĂŠ|totadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:totadĂŠshĂŠ|totadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:totadĂŠkĂŠ|totadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:totadathatha|totadathatha]] || [[word:totadajaja|totadajaja]] || [[word:totadashasha|totadashasha]] || [[word:totadakaka|totadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:totadatha|totadatha]] || [[word:totadaja|totadaja]] || [[word:totadasha|totadasha]] || [[word:totadaka|totadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:totadafthaf|totadafthaf]] || [[word:totadafjaf|totadafjaf]] || [[word:totadafshaf|totadafshaf]] || [[word:totadafkaf|totadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:totadasha|totadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:totadshĂ«sha|totadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:totadrosha|totadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:totadmusha|totadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:totadyasha|totadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gototadnkshĂ«sha|gototadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gototadnkrosha|gototadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gototadnkmusha|gototadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gototadnkyasha|gototadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:totatadasha|totatadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:totatadshĂ«sha|totatadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:totatadrosha|totatadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:totatadmusha|totatadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:totatadyasha|totatadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gototatadnkshĂ«sha|gototatadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gototatadnkrosha|gototatadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gototatadnkmusha|gototatadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gototatadnkyasha|gototatadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tetĂŠdasha|tetĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tetĂŠdshĂ«sha|tetĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tetĂŠdrosha|tetĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tetĂŠdmusha|tetĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tetĂŠdyasha|tetĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotetĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|gotetĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotetĂŠdnkrosha|gotetĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotetĂŠdnkmusha|gotetĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotetĂŠdnkyasha|gotetĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:totfadasha|totfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:totfadshĂ«sha|totfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:totfadrosha|totfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:totfadmusha|totfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:totfadyasha|totfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gototfadnkshĂ«sha|gototfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gototfadnkrosha|gototfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gototfadnkmusha|gototfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gototfadnkyasha|gototfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
